auth.error.username_blank:
Username cannot be blank.
Enter your username:
auth.error.username_invalid:
Invalid username. Use 3-20 characters (letters, digits, underscores).
Enter your username:
auth.error.account_locked:
Account '{username}' is temporarily locked. Try again in {time}.
Enter your username:
auth.error.account_locked_recheck:
Account locked. Try again in {time}.
Enter your username:
auth.error.account_locked_now:
Too many failed attempts. Account locked for 5 minutes.
Enter your username:
auth.error.password_wrong_generic:
Unable to sign in with those details.
Password:
auth.error.account_already_online:
That account is already online.
Enter your username:
auth.error.login_unavailable:
Unable to sign in right now.
Enter your username:
auth.prompt.create_or_exit:
Username '{username}' is not registered.
[1] Create a new character
[2] Exit
auth.error.creation_password_short:
Password must be at least 8 characters.
Choose a password:
auth.error.creation_confirm_invalid: Please enter [1] to create a character or [2] to exit.
auth.message.world_welcome: Welcome to {world}, {player}! Type 'help' for a list of commands.
auth.prompt.race_class:
Choose your race and class (e.g., 'Human Warrior', 'Elf Mage'):
Races: Human, Elf, Dwarf, Halfling, Orc, Dragonborn, Tiefling
Classes: Warrior, Mage, Rogue, Cleric, Ranger, Paladin, Bard
auth.error.race_class_blank:
Race and class cannot be blank.
Please choose your race and class:
auth.error.race_class_format: Please specify both race and class (e.g., 'Human Warrior').
auth.error.race_invalid: Invalid race. Choose from: Human, Elf, Dwarf, Halfling, Orc, Dragonborn, Tiefling
auth.prompt.pronouns: What are your preferred pronouns? (Examples: he, she, they, ze, or custom format: subject/object/possessive)
auth.error.pronouns_blank:
Pronouns cannot be blank.
Please enter your preferred pronouns:
auth.error.pronouns_format: Invalid pronoun format. Use 'he', 'she', 'they', 'ze', or custom format 'subject/object/possessive' (e.g., 'xe/xem/xyr').
auth.prompt.description: Describe your character (optional, type 'skip' to skip):
event.player.idle_timeout: {player} has been disconnected due to inactivity.
session.replaced.player_message: This connection was replaced by a newer session.
session.inactivity.player_message: You have been disconnected due to inactivity.
command.move.missing_room: That path leads nowhere (room '{roomId}' is missing).
command.move.blocked_by_encounter: вҡ пёҸ {enemies} block the way {direction}. Defeat them before you try to flee.
command.move.dark_damage: You stumble in the darkness and slam into a wall! You take {damage} damage.
command.follow.not_found: You don't see any player named '{player}' here.
command.follow.cycle: That would tangle the whole group into a follow loop.
command.follow.success: You fall in behind {player}. {pronounSubject} {pronounBe} now your group leader.
command.follow.stop: You stop following and leave the group.
command.follow.not_following: You aren't following anyone right now.
command.follow.lost: You lose track of {player} and stop following.
command.group.none: You are not currently in a group.
command.talk.npc_not_found: You don't see anyone called '{target}' here.
command.talk.npc_speech_failed: {npc} opens their mouth, but the words seem to get lost in the air.
command.dm.self: You can't send a DM to yourself.
command.moderation.blocked: That message matched the current moderation policy and wasn't sent.
command.moderation.blocked.category: That message matched the {category} moderation filter and wasn't sent.
command.moderation.not_moderator: Only moderators and gods can change the world moderation policy.
command.pickup.container_no_takeable: There's nothing in {container} you can take right now.
command.equip.success_swap: You put away the {previous} and equip the {item}.
command.unequip.slot_empty: You don't have anything equipped on your {slot}.
command.use.not_consumable: You can't use the {item} that way.
command.bind.unavailable: You cannot bind your recall point here.
command.bind.success: You bind your spirit to {room}. You will return here when defeated.
command.dead.blocked: You are dead. Type respawn to return to your recall point.
command.shop.no_shop: There is nothing for sale here.
command.shop.browse: You take a closer look at {merchant}'s wares.
command.shop.buy.not_enough_gold: You need {price} gold for the {item}, but you only have {gold}. You are short by {shortfall}.
command.shop.buy.success: You buy the {item} from {merchant} for {price} gold.
command.investigate.fallback: You search every corner of the room carefully, but find nothing new.
command.investigate.discovery_default: You search carefully and discover a hidden path to the {direction}!
command.logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to log out? Type yes to confirm or no to stay.
command.logout.reconfirm: Please type yes to log out or no to stay.
command.unknown: Unknown command: '{input}'. Type 'help' for a list of commands.
command.kick.broadcast_removal: {player} has been removed from the game by {god}.
command.kick.player_message: {god} evaporates your soul. You have been kicked from the game.
command.kick.god_confirm: [god] You have kicked {player} from the game.
command.smite.target_message: A bolt of divine judgment strikes you down.
command.setlevel.invalid_level: [god] Invalid level: must be a number.
command.setlevel.target_notify: Your level has been set to {level} by divine intervention.
command.setmoderator.target_notify_on: You have been granted moderator access.
command.setmoderator.target_notify_off: Your moderator access has been revoked.
command.summon.broadcast_away: {player} is summoned away in a burst of light.
command.summon.broadcast_arrive: {player} appears before {god} in a burst of light.
command.teleport.target_not_found: [god] Could not find player or NPC: {target}
command.teleport.broadcast_vanish: {player} vanishes in a flash of light.
command.teleport.broadcast_appear: {player} appears in a flash of light.
command.pickup.prerequisite_fail_default: Something holds you back. You feel unworthy of taking this.
action.bind: {player} kneels briefly, binding their spirit to this place.
action.recall.departure: {player} murmurs a word of recall and vanishes in a shimmer of pale light.
action.recall.arrival: {player} appears in a shimmer of pale light.
combat.unarmed_warning: вҡ пёҸ You are fighting unarmed! Type equip [weapon] to ready a weapon.
combat.target_not_found: You don't see any '{target}' here to attack.
combat.target_lost: {npc} is no longer here. Combat ends.
combat.begin:
Combat{npc}
{player}opens the fight.
combat.player_hits: {actorLabel}{action} {npc}.
combat.player_misses: {actorLabel}{action} {npc}.
combat.npc_hits: {npc}{action} you.
combat.party.npc_hits: {npc}{action} {player}.
combat.npc_health: {npc}{health}/{maxHealth} HP
combat.player_health: You{health}/{maxHealth} HP
combat.npc_defeated: Victory{npc} goes down.
combat.player_defeated: DefeatYou have been defeated.
combat.party.player_defeated: Defeat{player} has been defeated.
combat.player_death_prompt: RespawnType respawn to awaken at {room}. Your corpse and belongings remain where you fell.
combat.player_death_prompt_no_corpse: RespawnType respawn to awaken at {room}.
combat.player_death_prompt_no_item_loss: RespawnType respawn to awaken at {room}. Your belongings remain with you.
combat.player_dies_room: {player} collapses, lifeless, leaving a corpse behind.
combat.player_corpse.name: {player}'s corpse
combat.player_corpse.description.empty: The remains of {player} lie here, cold and still.
combat.player_corpse.description.items: The remains of {player} lie here. Their belongings rest within.
combat.xp_gained: XP+{xp} experience.
combat.gold_looted: Gold+{gold} gold looted.
combat.npc_respawns: Reset{npc} reconstitutes itself, ready for more training.
level.up: рҹҺү LEVEL UP! {name} has reached Level {level}!
level.up.multi: рҹҺү LEVEL UP! {name} has advanced from Level {old_level} to Level {new_level}!
level.up.world.multi: рҹҺү {name} has advanced to Level {level}! Congratulations!
level.max_reached: вӯҗ {name} has reached the maximum level!
consumable.effect.heal_over_time.start: A steady warmth will restore {amount} health every {tickSeconds} seconds for {durationSeconds} seconds.
consumable.effect.heal_over_time.end: The steady warmth fades, and your body settles.
consumable.effect.damage_over_time.start: A creeping sickness will drain {amount} health every {tickSeconds} seconds for {durationSeconds} seconds.
consumable.effect.damage_over_time.end: The creeping sickness finally loosens its grip.
consumable.effect.intoxication.start: The room begins to sway. For about {durationSeconds} seconds, your mouth may decide to embarrass you at unpredictable intervals.
consumable.effect.intoxication.end: The room steadies, and the strange urge to blurt nonsense passes.
combat.player_respawns: You awaken at {room}, pulled back to your recall point.
combat.player_respawn_departure: A pale shimmer rises from where {player} fell and drifts away.
combat.player_respawn_arrival: {player} staggers in, dragged back from the brink.
error.invalid_message_format: Invalid message format. Expected JSON: {"command":"look","args":[]} or {"input":"look around"}
error.session_state: Your session is in an unexpected state. Please reconnect.
error.game_error: An error occurred while processing your command.
error.internal: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
quest.prereq.level: You must be at least level {level} to accept this quest.
quest.prereq.quest: You must first complete '{quest}' before you can accept this quest.
quest.prereq.item: You need the {item} before you can accept this quest.
quest.defend.start.player: вҡ”пёҸ {enemies} close in on {target}. You have a few seconds before they start tearing in. If you choose to intervene, type attack {attackHint} or kill {attackHint}. Any wolf you engage stops mauling the traveler.
quest.defend.start.room: {target} cries out as {enemies} surge from the brush and fall on them.
quest.defend.under_attack: вҡ пёҸ {enemies} tear into {target} for {damage} damage. {target} has {health}/{maxHealth} resolve left. {seconds}s remain.
quest.defend.timer_warning: вҸі {target} is still under threat. Type attack {attackHint} or kill {attackHint}. {seconds}s remain.
quest.defend.failed.timeout: рҹ’Җ Quest Failed: {quest}. You waited too long, and {target} was lost to the chaos.
quest.defend.failed.target_death: рҹ’Җ Quest Failed: {quest}. {target} falls before you can save them.
quest.encounter.start.room: {enemies} rise in a rush of cold air, cutting off the way out.
quest.encounter.cleared: The last of {enemies} falls quiet. The path is open again.
quest.xp_reward: вңЁ You gain {xp} experience points.
quest.accept.none_available: There are no quests available from {npc}.
quest.accept.prompt:
{npc} has a quest for you: {quest}
{description}
Type accept to begin.
quest.accept.usage: Usage: accept [quest name] (talk to NPCs to discover available quests)
quest.give.no_npc: You don't see anyone called '{npc}' here.
quest.give.no_reaction: {npc} accepts the {item} but doesn't seem to need it for anything.
quest.give.special.no_reward_item: {npc} cannot find the promised item ({itemId}) to return to you.
